allow: Bash(node -e "const data = require\(''./src/data/tarot-cards.json''\); console.log\(''Total cards:'', data.length\); console.log\(''Sample entry keys:'', Object.keys\(data[0]\)\); console.log\(''First entry:'', JSON.stringify\(data[0], null, 2\)\); console.log\(''\\nLast entry:'', JSON.stringify\(data[data.length-1], null, 2\)\); const major = data.filter\(c => c.arcana === ''major''\).length; const minor = data.filter\(c => c.arcana === ''minor''\).length; console.log\(''\\nMajor:'', major, ''Minor:'', minor\);")
